zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Drury於大約1455年出生在英國素福爾可霍斯亞德時，他的父親Roger Drury37歲，母親Felice Denston22歲。他於1494年之前與Lady Anne of Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk Calthorpe Drury結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭被列為he was elected knight of the shire (mp) for suffolk in 1491, 1495 and 1510。他去世於1537年1月21日在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲聖 馬也斯 邱奇享年83歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Drury于大约1455年出生在英国素福爾可霍斯亞德时，他的父亲Roger Drury37岁，母亲Felice Denston22岁。他于1494年之前与Lady Anne of Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk Calthorpe Drury结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰被列为he was elected knight of the shire (mp) for suffolk in 1491, 1495 and 1510。他去世于1537年1月21日在英国英格兰素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲聖 馬也斯 邱奇享年83岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Drury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from a Norman French personal name Dreus based on ancient Germanic Drogo, the name of one of the sons of Charlemagne (compare Gothic driugan ‘to serve as a soldier’). In Old French this name became Dreus, Drues (nominative) and Dru, Driu, Dreu (accusative) and was introduced to England by the Normans. For further information about this name, see also Montague .
English: from the personal name Drew, a pet form of Andrew which was confused with the same name of Old French origin (see 1 above).

Irish: when not an adoption of the English surname, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Druaidh or Ó Druaidh or Ó Draoi ‘son’ and ‘descendant of the druid’, from draoi ‘druid’, genitive druadh or draoi. All of these were often Anglicized as Drury .

variants.name: Drews
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Gerhard, Gunter, Hans, Heinz, Helmut, Otto, Reinhold, Bernd, Detlef, Egon, Erna.
English: variant of Drew with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is also found in Guernsey in the Channel Islands.
Americanized form of German, Danish, and Dutch   Drewes  .

variants.name: Drewer
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Droart, Drouart (which is probably from ancient Germanic Droghard, with the first element as in Drew + hard ‘brave, hardy’).

variants.name: Drewett
meanings: English (Wiltshire, Berkshire, and Surrey): of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Druet, a diminutive of Drue, Dreu (from ancient Germanic Drogo); see Drew 1. Alternatively, the name may be from a diminutive of Old French dru ‘lover’; see Drew 4.

variants.name: Dronet
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcee, Desire, Olympe.

French (mainly Loire-Atlantique): from a diminutive of the personal name Dron, derived from the ancient Germanic name Drogo, a short form of compound names based on the element drog, presumably meaning ‘battle’ (see also Drew ).

variants.name: Droz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Aida, Cruz Maria, Diego, Jose, Miguel, Milagros, Nydia, Osvaldo, Rodriguez, Vidal.

French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Drogo, a short form of compound names based on the element drog, presumably meaning ‘battle’ (see also Drew ). This surname is also found in Puerto Rico.

variants.name: Drea
meanings: Irish (Kilkenny): shortened Anglicized form of Ó Draoi (see Drew ).

variants.name: Montague
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

variants.name: Drouin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Armand, Benoit, Jacques, Andre, Clermont, Emile, Gaston, Gilles, Ovide, Pierre, Serge.

French: from a pet form of the Old French personal name Droue, a variant of Dreue, which is from the ancient Germanic name Drogo, a short form of compound names based on the element drog, presumably meaning ‘battle’ (see also Drew ). Compare Derouen , Derouin , and Tron .

variants.name: Drouhard
meanings: French:
from the ancient Germanic personal name Droghard, composed of the elements drog (presumably meaning ‘battle’; see also Drew ) and hard ‘hard, strong’.
alternatively, a derivative of the ancient Germanic name Drogo, a short form of compound names like Droghard (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Drury was born about 1455, in Hawstead, Suffolk, England, his father, Roger Drury, was 37 and his mother, Felice Denston, was 22. He married Lady Anne of Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk Calthorpe Drury before 1494. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. His occupation is listed as he was elected knight of the shire (mp) for suffolk in 1491, 1495 and 1510 in England, United Kingdom. He died on 21 January 1537, in St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 83, and was buried in St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Drury est né environ 1455, à Hawstead, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Roger Drury, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Felice Denston, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anne of Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk Calthorpe Drury avant 1494. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est he was elected knight of the shire (mp) for suffolk in 1491, 1495 and 1510 à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 21 janvier 1537, à St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Drury um 1455 in Hawstead, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Drury 37 und seine Mutter Felice Denston 22. Er hat vor 1494 Lady Anne of Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk Calthorpe Drury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als he was elected knight of the shire (mp) for suffolk in 1491, 1495 and 1510 in England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 21. Januar 1537 im Alter von 83 Jahren in St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Drury è nato il circa 1455 nel Hawstead, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Roger Drury, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Felice Denston, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Lady Anne of Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk Calthorpe Drury prima del 1494. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come he was elected knight of the shire (mp) for suffolk in 1491, 1495 and 1510 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 21 gennaio 1537, nel St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffo: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Drury(이)가 대략 1455년 영국 수폴크 호스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Drury(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Felice Denston(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1494년 이전 Lady Anne of Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk Calthorpe Drury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드에서 he was elected knight of the shire (mp) for suffolk in 1491, 1495 and 1510이었다. 그는 1537년 1월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 마이'스 c후르치에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 마이'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Drury nasceu aproximadamente 1455, em Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Drury, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Felice Denston, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Anne of Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk Calthorpe Drury antes 1494. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como he was elected knight of the shire (mp) for suffolk in 1491, 1495 and 1510 em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 21 de janeiro de 1537, em St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 83 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Drury родился около 1455 г. в местности хавстид, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Drury было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Felice Denston, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anne of Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk Calthorpe Drury перед 1494 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери.  Он работал по профессии he was elected knight of the shire (mp) for suffolk in 1491, 1495 and 1510 в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 21 января 1537 г. в местности ст мэри'с чурч, бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри'с чурч, бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Drury nació aproximadamente 1455, en Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Drury, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Felice Denston, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lady Anne of Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk Calthorpe Drury antes de 1494. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era he was elected knight of the shire (mp) for suffolk in 1491, 1495 and 1510 en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 21 de enero de 1537, en St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultado en St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
